title: Piglin-Free Portals
description: Stop pigman from spawning in your nether portals, freeing up you mobcap and preventing them from running around your home.
body:
Stops Piglins from spawning on nether portals. Perfect fix for portal based farms, with lower rates due to piglins filling mobcap. Or for people tired of having to gate off their portals.

If you need before 1.19, here is another similar version of the mod [Pigless Portals (not affiliated)](https://modrinth.com/mod/pigless-portals)

**Please report bugs on github.**
